channel.title: summarizedStoriesMainNLscienceAndDiscovery
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from summarizedStoriesMainNLscienceAndDiscovery, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Creatine may help fight depression, scientists say
item.description: Creatine is known as a muscle-building supplement, but researchers are exploring its potential to treat depression by boosting brain energy.

item.title: Massive asteroid struck North Sea, causing 330-foot tsunami
item.description: Scientists have confirmed that a 160-meter-wide asteroid created the Silverpit Crater beneath the North Sea and triggered a massive tsunami.

item.title: Scientists may have discovered how Alzheimer's spreads in the brain
item.description: A common brain protein might help Alzheimer's spread by carrying toxic Tau from damaged neurons to healthy ones.

item.title: Why scientists worry we might miss signs of extraterrestrial life
item.description: Researchers fear we could overlook evidence of alien life due to hidden biosignatures and limitations in detection methods.
